items.title: Punjab governor gives assent to anti-sacrilege Bill
items.summary: The Jaagat Jot Sri Guru Granth Sahib Satkar (Amendment) Bill, 2026, proposes stricter punishments to deter incidents of 'beadbi' (sacrilege) and uphold the sanctity of the Guru...

items.title: Bodies of 50 infants dumped at Trinidad graveyard
items.summary: Police say a preliminary investigation shows it may be a case of an "unlawful disposal of unclaimed corpses".
